privileged_info_summary: This task generates a synthetic soccer league dataset with 8 teams (Bears, Eagles, Hawks, Lions, Panthers, Sharks, Tigers, Wolves) playing 28 matches (7 rounds of 4 matches each) from 2024-03-02 to 2024-04-13. The task applies the standard international soccer points system (Win=3, Draw=1, Loss=0), calculates goal difference (GF - GA), and sorts standings by points (descending) then goal difference (descending). Expected winner is Tigers with 17 points. Success requires 70% accuracy (4 out of 6 criteria): all teams present, correct points calculation, correct goal difference, primary sort validity, tiebreaker sort validity, and accurate position numbering.
